xp.subtitle: Control XP sources, voice tracking, exclusions and automatic level roles.
xp.watchdogDegraded: VCWatchdog enabled, but the current run is degraded.
xp.loadingHint: Retrieving server resources and watchdog status.
xp.boosterDescription: Reward active server boosters with additional XP based on the duration of their current boost.
xp.boosterNoTiers: No booster tiers configured. The bonus remains neutral.
xp.boosterThresholdHint: Before the first configured threshold, no additional bonus applies.
xp.boosterLastTierHint: The highest tier continues to apply for all later months.
xp.boosterMonthsValidation: Enter a non-negative whole number of months.
xp.boosterDuplicateValidation: Each month threshold may only be used once.
xp.boosterMultiplierValidation: Enter a multiplier from 1.00 to 10.00 with at most two decimal places.
xp.boosterOrderValidation: The multiplier must not be lower than the preceding tier.
xp.watchdogDescription: Tracks eligible voice time and automatically awards earned XP.
xp.noCheck: No check has run for this server yet.
xp.moduleHint: The main switch pauses all XP awards on this server.
xp.messageHint: Reward helpful contributions without encouraging spam.
xp.maximumValidation: Maximum values must be at least as large as their minimum values.
xp.voiceHint: Choose when and how much active voice time is rewarded.
xp.multiplePeopleHint: No XP is earned while alone in a channel.
xp.excludeAfkHint: Time in the server AFK channel is ignored.
xp.interactionsHint: Enable only signals that represent real participation on your server.
xp.exclusionsHint: These roles and areas receive no points regardless of the XP source.
xp.multipliersHint: Increase or reduce voice XP in specific channels.
xp.levelRolesHint: Automatically grant Discord roles at a level.
xp.noRoleAutomation: No automatic role grants configured yet.
xp.importHint: Import existing XP and messages from a MEE6 JSON export.

seasons.title: XP seasons
seasons.subtitle: Run optional, archived XP competitions without changing lifetime progression.
seasons.enableHint: Lifetime XP continues unchanged. Season XP starts only within an active season.
seasons.basicHint: Set the cadence, local time zone and how upcoming seasons are named.
seasons.rotationHint: Required when the template contains {rotation}. Entries repeat cyclically.
seasons.previewHint: The preview is calculated by the server using the configured time zone.
seasons.manualPlanningHint: For a manual schedule, create each season with its explicit dates.
seasons.noPreview: Choose an automatic schedule and a valid anchor to preview future seasons.
seasons.noSeasons: No seasons have been created yet.
seasons.resumeUnavailableHint: This season is outside its original time range and cannot be resumed.
seasons.cancelActiveHint: End the active season before cancelling it.

confirm.start: Start {{name}} now? This activates season XP for its configured time range.
confirm.close: Close {{name}} early? Final standings will be created and cannot be changed.
confirm.cancel: Cancel {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.resume: Resume {{name}}? Season XP will continue until its original end time.
confirm.delete: Delete {{name}} permanently? This cannot be undone.
confirm.disable: Disable seasons? Every active or closing season will be finalized immediately. Lifetime XP remains unchanged.

errors.invalidJson: The selected file does not contain valid JSON.
errors.seasonPreview: Could not create a season preview.
errors.seasonAction: Could not perform the season action.
errors.seasonPlan: Could not plan the requested seasons.

season.invalidTimeZone: The season time zone is invalid.
season.invalidSchedule: The season schedule or naming template is invalid.
season.invalidTransition: The requested season status transition is not allowed.
season.activeConflict: Another season is already active for this server.
season.notResumable: This season can only be resumed during its original time range.
season.planConflict: The requested seasons overlap with the existing plan.

settings.groupsRequired: All XP setting groups are required.
settings.collectionsRequired: All XP rule collections are required.
settings.messageCooldown: Message cooldown must not be negative.
settings.voicePoints: Voice XP values must not be negative.
settings.eventInterest: Event interest XP must not be negative.
settings.channelMultipliers: Channel multipliers require unique channels and non-negative values.
settings.levelRoles: Level roles require unique roles and positive levels.
settings.serverBoosterRequired: Server booster settings and tiers are required.
settings.serverBoosterTierCount: At most 10 server booster tiers are allowed.
settings.serverBoosterMonths: Boost months must be a non-negative whole number.
settings.serverBoosterMultiplier: Booster multipliers must be between 1.00 and 10.00 with at most two decimal places.
settings.serverBoosterDuplicateMonths: Server booster month thresholds must be unique.
settings.serverBoosterOrder: Server booster multipliers must not decrease as boost duration increases.

import.guildMismatch: The MEE6 export belongs to another server.
import.invalidPlayers: The MEE6 player export is invalid.
